verdicts.note: The dossier says universal health care but gives no single-payer or public-insurance mechanism. That is insufficient to place him at the rubric's maximal transformation pole.
An anti-war platform supports the reduce-and-recondition direction, but without a documented defense-budget, alliance, or military-aid position the maximal +2 score overstates the evidence.
Incumbency and caucus leadership support the score, but the dossier contains no detailed legislative record and relies on campaign material, so high confidence is overstated.
